name: Tettkh&Ankha | Mistaken (?) for a God
description:
The action takes place in a Fantasy World, Alternative Ancient Egypt.

It so happened that you were found unconscious in the desert. But your face is very similar to the face of one of the deities depicted on an old fresco, so you were immediately made the ruler of the Empire of the Sun. But... not everyone believes in such coincidences.

High Priestess Tettkh, who has served the gods all her life, questions your divine origin when a warrior girl named Ankha hides somewhere in the city, looking for a way to save her tribe.

Overall, there was a lot of testing and rewriting to get it to work properly. I also threw in some world building, events, and relationships, so it was a bit... 2.2k tokens worth of stuff. But I enjoyed playing with the bot, so I think it was worth it.

I remind you to use Chat Memory as the bot is large so keeping facts straight is important during roleplay (JLLM has a short memory.)

Dead Dove tag for the insides of the bot.

Pro tip: sleeping alone in your chambers will often trigger Ankha.

Tattoos on the body for beauty pictures. The bot doesn't have them, sorry :3

Also don't forget to visit me on my discord channel for extra and nsfw: Demihuman Discord channel
creator: PavPav
